new_product_concepts.name: Cross-theatre monitor: iran_oil
new_product_concepts.rationale: Affects 7 theatres (europe, africa, asia, middle_east, north_america, south_america, global_finance). Cross-theatre dynamics are analytically underserved.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Inter-theatre dependencies increasing as crisis complexity grows.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: How does iran_oil connect across theatres?
new_product_concepts.methodology: Comparative narrative tracking + cross-correlation of key indicators.

new_product_concepts.name: Intelligence gap monitor: europe
new_product_concepts.emergence: Persistent gaps indicate structural collection deficiency.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: Why do these gaps persist and what alternative sources exist?
new_product_concepts.methodology: Source reliability tracking + gap persistence analysis.

new_product_concepts.name: Intelligence gap monitor: south_america
new_product_concepts.rationale: Recurring intelligence gap: south_america: uncorroborated, cannot assess, insufficient
new_product_concepts.emergence: Persistent gaps indicate structural collection deficiency.

new_product_concepts.name: Escalation Ladder Monitor
new_product_concepts.rationale: Multiple theatres show escalation language. A structured escalation tracking framework across all theatres would provide early warning of escalation cascades.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Concurrent crisis across Hormuz, Ukraine, Taiwan, Lebanon.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: Are escalation dynamics correlated across theatres?
new_product_concepts.forecasting_edge: Cross-theatre view not available to single-theatre analysts.
new_product_concepts.methodology: Structured escalation stages (1-10) per theatre, updated daily with trigger events.

new_product_concepts.name: Narrative Regime-Change Detector
new_product_concepts.rationale: Narrative regime shifts are early indicators of strategic change. A detector that flags when narratives restructure would provide strategic warning.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Narrative tracking infrastructure now exists (narrative_engine.py). Cross-edition comparison is operational.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: When does a narrative evolution become a regime shift?
new_product_concepts.forecasting_edge: Structural narrative analysis across 7 theatres with FTS5 persistence.
new_product_concepts.methodology: Fingerprint comparison across editions + header structure analysis.

new_product_concepts.name: Prediction Market vs Assessment Divergence Report
new_product_concepts.rationale: When prediction markets disagree with TREVOR's assessments, it signals either market inefficiency or analytical blind spot.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Both Kalshi integration and assessment generation are operational. Divergence detection is now possible.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: Where is TREVOR's assessment diverging from market pricing?
new_product_concepts.forecasting_edge: Direct comparison of estimative probability vs market-implied probability.
new_product_concepts.methodology: Systematic comparison of key judgment probability ranges with prediction market prices.

new_product_concepts.name: Geopolitical Risk Heatmap
new_product_concepts.rationale: A visual risk heatmap across all 7 theatres would provide executive-level strategic awareness at a glance.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Priority scoring infrastructure exists. Narrative engine provides drift data.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: Where is risk accumulating across the global security environment?
new_product_concepts.forecasting_edge: Structured risk assessment across all theatres simultaneously.
new_product_concepts.methodology: Aggregate priority scores, narrative volatility, escalation signals, and intel gaps into a weighted risk score per theatre.

new_product_concepts.name: Forecast Track Record & Calibration Dashboard
new_product_concepts.rationale: Trevor produces probabilistic key judgments but has never audited its own forecast accuracy. A calibration dashboard would enable continuous improvement.
new_product_concepts.emergence: Briefometer infrastructure exists. Brier score collection is operational.
new_product_concepts.strategic_question: How accurate is TREVOR's estimative analysis over time?
new_product_concepts.forecasting_edge: Direct insight into own performance — rare in intelligence analysis.
new_product_concepts.methodology: Daily Brier score logging + calibration curve analysis + over/under-confidence detection.
